Dear Students and the Candidate Students,

The companies as being one of the key players of the economy are required to grow and develop sustainably in a rapidly and continuously changing world in order to contribute to the welfare of countries. The educational institutions generate skilled human resources who play a key role in the growth and development of companies.

The business administration department aims at educating candidate managers who are analytical, interpretive, informative and practical that secures viability and prosperity of companies. The courses that are shaped by the perspectives of select domestic and international universities’ programs, professionals in the business world and our graduates are based on dynamism and are subject to an ongoing update concerning the requirements of international educational standards.

The program of the business administration department with its highly disciplined conception includes courses that focus on vocational training, monitoring trends in the world and improving skills of multi-dimensional thinking in the first two years of education, while the courses that concentrate on specialization in profession in the last two years. The required internship in the program eases the use of theory in practice and helps choose the field they work in after graduation for students.

The business administration department being conscious of having efficient academic staff set up a team whose young and experienced members undertook various posts both in the select domestic and international universities and in the business world. Based on the student-orientated education principle of the institution, all academic staff who are in close contact with all students perform mentoring and coaching roles for all students.

We profoundly believe that our graduates, students and future students will greatly contribute to the growth and development of our department as well as to the human capital of our country.

With love,

Prof. Dr. Nüket SARACEL

Head of Department
